title: Heartbeat and Signal Channel Flow
interaction_flow: CommonConnectorConfig → HeartbeatFactory: getScheduledHeartbeat(config, null, null, queue)
HeartbeatFactory → HeartbeatImpl: new HeartbeatImpl(heartbeatInterval, topicName, logicalName, schemaNameAdjuster, queue)
EventDispatcher: stores ScheduledHeartbeat; sets heartbeatIntervalFactor=0.8f on BinlogClient
Note: server HEARTBEAT events update milliSecondsBehindSource metric but do NOT emit to Kafka topic
=== PERIODIC DEBEZIUM HEARTBEAT EMISSION (per binlog event) ===
HeartbeatImpl: if heartbeatTimeout.expired() → call emit(partition, offset)
HeartbeatImpl → ChangeEventQueue: enqueue(new DataChangeEvent(SourceRecord to '__debezium-heartbeat.<logicalName>' topic))
EventDispatcher → HeartbeatImpl: emit(partition, offset) [unconditional, no timer check]
HeartbeatImpl: on SQLException during heartbeat action query
SignalProcessor → SignalAction: action.arrived(SignalPayload{partition, id, type, data, offset})
=== SIGNAL VIA SOURCE (signal table CDC event) ===
BinlogClient → BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource: emit(Event for signal data collection)
key_relationships: SignalProcessor contains List<SignalChannelReader> (SourceSignalChannel, KafkaSignalChannel, FileSignalChannel, JmxSignalChannel, InProcessSignalChannel)
SignalProcessor contains Map<String, SignalAction> (keyed by signal type)
CommonConnectorConfig provides heartbeatInterval, heartbeatTopicsPrefix, signalPollInterval, signalingDataCollectionIds, signalEnabledChannels

config_fields.heartbeat.topics.prefix: default '__debezium-heartbeat'; prefix for heartbeat Kafka topic
config_fields.signal.data.collection: LIST; fully-qualified signal table name(s); empty = signaling disabled
config_fields.signal.poll.interval.ms: default 5000ms; scheduled poll rate for non-source signal channels

important_notes: BinlogClient.heartbeatInterval = keepAliveInterval * 0.8 (heartbeatIntervalFactor) — server-level keep-alive heartbeat, separate from Debezium heartbeat topic
EventType.HEARTBEAT from server does NOT emit to Kafka; it only updates lag metric and triggers IncrementalSnapshot heartbeat
dispatchHeartbeatEvent is called AFTER every binlog event but HeartbeatImpl only emits when timer expires
Source signal channel is synchronous: signal table CDC event → SourceSignalChannel.process() → SignalProcessor.processSourceSignal() all in same event loop iteration
Scheduled SignalProcessor polls all non-source channels (Kafka, File, JMX, InProcess) at fixed rate
BinlogHeartbeatErrorHandler handles SQL errors 42000 (access denied) and 3D000 (no DB) by throwing DebeziumException; other SQL errors are silently ignored
HeartbeatImpl.emit() requires queue constructor (2-arg); older forcedBeat/heartbeat methods use BlockingConsumer pattern (deprecated)
